message:
Refactor agent-detection.service.ts to use ToolRegistry (bd-23qe)

- Add getRegistryDefinitions() to load tools from ACFS manifest
- Add buildCLIDefinition() to convert ToolDefinition to CLIDefinition
- Integrate registry into detectAgentCLIs() and detectToolCLIs()
- Fall back to hardcoded lists when registry unavailable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Ensure installCommand/docsUrl surface correctly from manifest.

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Unit/integration: bd-1rdc (registry-driven setup/detection).
- Contract: bd-2lvp.
- E2E: bd-1uog.
